name: article-content-writer
description: AI-powered long-form article writer with inline image prompt generation. 5-step optimized pipeline with 20 hard rules, 107-word AI humanization system, 12 content templates, GEO/AEO optimization, and combined 100-point scoring (Quality + Virality + SEO + AI Humanization + GEO). Includes 14 copywriting frameworks, 8 hook types, and GeminiGen.AI image prompts.
